main.description: Authoritative delegation of a role within a forum board. Written by the board owner (who controls the repo where the board record lives) into their OWN repo, so the grant is verifiable: any client can confirm that the granting repo also authored the board record. This is the foundation of trustworthy moderation on atproto — unlike the self-asserted 'role' field on member records, a roleGrant proves the board owner actually delegated authority. Deterministic rkey convention: hashRkey('role', did + boardUri).

board.description: The board the grant applies to. MUST live in the same repo as this roleGrant record for the grant to be authoritative.

subject.description: The DID receiving the granted role.

role.description: The role granted. 'owner' grants are typically only self-granted by the board creator.

revokedAt.description: If set, the grant is revoked as of this time.
